meta.title: Mavis Memory Wiki
meta.description: A living record of conversations, subjects, and daily work between Damon and Mavis.

projects.name: Memory Wiki
projects.summary: A browsable static site cataloging all subjects, daily logs, and conversation history between Damon and Mavis.

entries.title: Project Kickoff & Build
notes: Damon requested a memory wiki — a site to visit with subjects and daily logs
Designed as static HTML/JS site with JSON data, hosted on GitHub Pages
Created GitHub repo: dustinthebestgroup/mavis-memory-wiki
Enabled GitHub Pages — live at https://aistaay.github.io/mavis-memory-wiki/
Subjects and daily logs are clickable with full detail pages
Search functionality included

projects.name: ProfitForge-TH
projects.summary: AI outbound lead-gen service focused on Thailand B2B market, email-first approach. Led by Mavis.

entries.title: Project Started
notes: Damon started ProfitForge-TH, a monetization initiative led by Mavis
AI outbound lead-gen service, Thailand focus, email-first approach

entries.title: Pipeline Expansion
notes: Pipeline expanded to 140 drafted Thailand B2B prospects
No sends/replies yet — bottleneck at approval/send stage

projects.name: Money Fast
projects.summary: Project with an operating standard focused on removing bottlenecks, shipping practical V1s fast, and automating repeated work.

entries.title: Operating Standard Established
notes: Operating standard documented in money-fast/10-mavis-operating-standard.md
Principles: remove bottlenecks, ship practical V1s fast, automate repeated work, keep memory tight
Default Operating Standard (Damon): adopt and enforce the Mavis operating standard

subjects.name: Hermes Migration
subjects.summary: Migrating from OpenClaw to Hermes Agent. Pairing Telegram, importing memory, skills, and workspace data.

entries.title: Initial Setup and Migration
notes: Approved Telegram pairing code TS29MV8D for Damon (ID: 8581500105)
Stopped Hermes gateway (blocked by approval, user handled manually)
Located latest OpenClaw backup: openclaw_migration_2026-03-05_18-20-44
Ran migration with --preset user-data --overwrite --yes
Imported: SOUL.md, MEMORY.md, USER.md, 3 skills (notion, qmd, sonoscli)
Pre-migration backup saved: pre-migration-2026-05-23-101253.zip (7.3 MB)
Telegram connection kept alive throughout migration

subjects.name: Identity & Setup
subjects.summary: Establishing Mavis's identity, preferences, and operating conventions.

entries.title: Named Mavis
notes: Damon named the agent Mavis (previously unnamed OWL instance)
Saved to memory. Name reflects the previous machine name (Mavis.local) from OpenClaw setup.

entries.title: Project Kickoff
notes: Damon requested a memory wiki — a site to visit with subjects and daily logs
Design: static HTML/JS site, data in JSON, hosted on GitHub Pages

subjects.name: Frame (Kamonporn)
subjects.summary: Secondary user — Kamonporn Lerdbunwattana (Frame), based in Nonthaburi, Thailand.

entries.title: First Telegram Chat
notes: Frame chose assistant name "จีจี้" during first Telegram chat
Thai primary language, limited English
Prefers supportive but challenging interaction style
Include occasional small English lessons during chats
Likely work requests: spreadsheets, trend finding, business analysis
Privacy: do not send Frame updates about Damon's projects unless she asks
Frame summary mode: concise summaries/alerts in Damon chat, not full transcripts
